◎简　　介  

　　A North Norwegian worker's western with Simon J Berger as a ruthless mine foreman in an epic dramatization of the Sulis uprising of 1907.In the isolated village of Sulitjelma, the mining company rules with an iron fist, and a spirit of rebellion grows among the workers.
